WorldDirector: Building Controllable World Simulators with Persistent Dynamic Memory
articles.excerpt: We present WorldDirector, a highly controllable video world model framework designed for persistent dynamic object memory and unrestricted viewpoint exploration. Unlike existing world models that entangle physical dynamics with pixel rendering and rely on continuous visual observation to sustain motion, our framework explicitly decouples semantic motion orchestration from visual generation. By lev
articles.summary: 提出WorldDirector框架，通过解耦语义运动编排与视觉生成，实现视频世界模型中持久动态物体记忆与自由视角探索。相比现有方法依赖连续视觉观察维持运动，该方法提升了可控性和鲁棒性，适用于生成式仿真与交互场景。

articles.title: ACID: Action Consistency via Inverse Dynamics for Planning with World Models
articles.excerpt: Decision-time planning with action-conditioned world models has become a popular paradigm for embodied control. However, the standard planning cost judges a candidate solely by how close its predicted terminal state lies to the goal, leaving the realizability of the intermediate transitions unchecked -- a predicted trajectory can look convincing while the environment rollout drifts away from it. I
articles.summary: 针对决策时规划中标准代价函数忽略中间过渡可实现性的问题，提出ACID方法，利用逆动力学确保动作一致性。该方法检查预测轨迹的中间状态是否可达，防止规划结果与真实环境漂移，提升具身控制中世界模型规划的可靠性。

articles.title: Optimizing Visual Generative Models via Distribution-wise Rewards
articles.excerpt: Conventional reinforcement learning strategies for visual generation typically employ sample-wise reward functions, yet this practice frequently results in reward hacking that degrades image diversity and introduces visual anomalies. To address these limitations, we present a novel framework that finetunes generative models using distribution-wise rewards, ensuring better alignment with real-world
articles.summary: 为解决视觉生成中基于样本奖励导致的奖励破解（多样性下降、视觉异常），提出分布级奖励微调框架。通过优化生成分布与真实分布的一致性，提升图像多样性与质量，为生成模型对齐提供新思路。

articles.title: AgenticSTS: A Bounded-Memory Testbed for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
articles.excerpt: Memory for a long-horizon LLM agent is a contract about what each future decision is allowed to see. The simplest contract appends past observations, tool calls, and reflections to every prompt, which makes prior context easy to access but also turns it into a jumbled mixture in which the effect of any single memory component is hard to isolate. We introduce and instrument an alternative bounded c
articles.summary: 引入AgenticSTS测试平台，通过有界内存契约隔离长期LLM代理中各个记忆组件的效果。相比简单拼接历史上下文，该方法使得对记忆影响的归因分析成为可能，有助于设计更高效的长时程代理系统。

articles.title: Bridge-WA: Predicting Where and How the World Changes for Robotic Action
articles.excerpt: General-purpose vision-language-action models benefit from large vision-language priors, but effective manipulation also requires anticipating action-relevant scene changes. Existing world-action models often rely on large generative world models or dense future rollouts, which are expensive and spend capacity on visual details weakly coupled to control. We present Bridge-WA, a lightweight world-a
articles.summary: 提出轻量化世界-动作模型Bridge-WA，预测与动作相关的场景变化，避免昂贵的大规模生成模型或密集未来rollout。利用视觉-语言先验，专注于控制紧密耦合的视觉改变，提升机器人操作的效率与泛化性。

articles.title: PACE: A Proxy for Agentic Capability Evaluation
articles.excerpt: Evaluating LLM agents on benchmarks like SWE-Bench and GAIA can be expensive, time-consuming, and requires complex infrastructure. A single evaluation can cost thousands of dollars and take days to complete. In contrast, non-agentic LLM benchmarks that test individual capabilities (e.g., reasoning, code generation) are fast and cheap to run. In this paper, we investigate whether performance on exp
articles.summary: 针对LLM代理在SWE-Bench等基准上评估成本高昂的问题，提出PACE代理能力评估代理。通过非代理基准（推理、代码生成）预测代理性能，大幅降低评估时间与成本，为快速迭代提供有效替代方案。

articles.title: SkillCoach: Self-Evolving Rubrics for Evaluating and Enhancing Agentic Skill-Use
articles.excerpt: Skills are becoming a reusable operational layer for LLM agents, encoding SOPs, domain rules, tool workflows, scripts, and validation routines. In realistic skill repositories, overlapping skills make reliable skill-use difficult. Final verifier success is too coarse for both evaluation and training, since an agent may pass through trial and error while selecting distractor skills, skipping requir
articles.summary: 针对LLM代理技能库中重叠技能导致技能使用不可靠的问题，提出SkillCoach自演进评分系统。通过细粒度评估代理的技能选择与执行过程，超越最终验证器成功率的粗糙度量，提升代理在复杂技能库中的表现。

articles.title: Denser neq Better: Limits of On-Policy Self-Distillation for Continual Post-Training
articles.excerpt: Continual post-training enables foundation models to acquire new knowledge while preserving existing capabilities. Recent work suggests that on-policy learning can mitigate forgetting, with on-policy self-distillation emerging as a particularly attractive approach. In this work, we revisit this optimistic view through self-distillation policy optimization (SDPO). Our experiments show that SDPO can
articles.summary: 通过自蒸馏策略优化（SDPO）实验，揭示在持续后训练中，更密集的策略自蒸馏并非总是更好。研究发现SDPO可能导致过拟合或遗忘，挑战了「on-policy自蒸馏可缓解遗忘」的乐观观点，为持续学习提供新见解。

articles.title: AgenticDataBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Data Agents
articles.excerpt: Data science aims to derive actionable insights from heterogeneous raw data, unlocking the value of the massive amounts of data generated in modern society. Automating this process is essential to reducing labor-intensive efforts for data scientists and enabling scalable data-driven applications. Recently, large language model (LLM)-based data agents have emerged as a promising solution to automat
articles.summary: 提出AgenticDataBench全面基准，评估基于LLM的数据代理在自动化数据科学流程中的性能。涵盖异构原始数据理解、查询生成、分析等任务，旨在减少数据科学家的人工负担，推动可扩展数据驱动应用。

articles.title: Is One Layer Enough? Training A Single Transformer Layer Can Match Full-Parameter RL Training
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a central component of post-training large language models (LLMs), yet little is understood about how RL adaptation is distributed across transformer layers. Existing approaches typically update all model parameters uniformly, implicitly assuming that every layer contributes similarly to the gains obtained during RL post-training. In this work, we challenge t
articles.summary: 挑战RL后训练中统一更新所有参数的假设，发现仅训练单层Transformer即可匹配全参数RL训练的性能。揭示RL适应在层间分布不均，为高效LLM后训练提供新方向，减少计算资源消耗。

articles.title: WorldOdysseyBench: An Open-World Benchmark for Long-Horizon Stability of Interactive World Models
articles.excerpt: Despite rapid progress in interactive world models (IWMs), existing benchmarks evaluate action following only at trajectory level and ignore memory and interaction physics. We introduce WorldOdysseyBench, an open-world benchmark for long-horizon stability across four dimensions, each with tailored innovations: (i) Action: per-frame action metric bypassing cross-model semantic scale disparity and e
articles.summary: 引入WorldOdysseyBench开放世界基准，从动作、记忆、交互物理等四个维度评估交互世界模型的长期稳定性。提出每帧动作度量等创新，填补现有基准忽略记忆和交互物理的空白，推动世界模型研究。

articles.title: A Unified Framework for the Evaluation of LLM Agentic Capabilities
articles.excerpt: As LLMs are increasingly deployed as agents, reliable assessment of their agentic capabilities has become essential. However, reported benchmark scores often jointly reflect model capability and the implementation choices each benchmark is packaged with, making cross-benchmark results difficult to interpret as clean measurements of the underlying model. In this work, we present a unified framework
articles.summary: 提出统一评估框架，分离模型能力与基准实现细节，使跨基准的代理能力得分可比。解决当前基准分数混杂实现选择的问题，为LLM代理能力的可靠评估提供标准化方法。

articles.title: Next-Generation Agentic Reinforcement Learning Systems Enable Self-Evolving Agents
articles.excerpt: LLM agents are rapidly being deployed in production, including coding assistants, customer-support chatbots, and scientific research assistants, yet they remain fundamentally static in enterprise deployment. The LLM weights, system prompts, tool repertoires, and in-context harnesses are frozen at deployment time, and any improvement requires a manual loop of human-curated data collection, offline
articles.summary: 针对LLM代理在生产部署中静态、无法自我改进的问题，提出下一代智能体强化学习系统，使代理能够在部署后通过环境反馈自动更新权重、提示、工具库等。减少人工干预，实现持续自我进化。
